title: Fix noisy source trajectory read errors in AgentExperienceContextProvider
description:
## Why
AgentExperienceContextProvider logs repeated ERROR traces when a candidate experience links to a missing source trajectory URI such as viking://agent/conv-42/memories/experiences/extract_conversation_interests.md. This creates noise during debug and may indicate stale or malformed derived_from links.

## What needs to be done
- Reproduce and inspect how source trajectory URIs are loaded for candidate experiences
- Determine whether the URI type/path is stale or malformed
- Fix the provider to handle missing source trajectories gracefully and avoid duplicate noisy errors
- Add or update tests for the regression
